quote: Ideogram 3.0 scores between 90 and 95 percent on text accuracy tests. Midjourney V7 lands around 30–40 percent on similar tests
Midjourney V8 Alpha text rendering reaches approximately 58% on single-phrase prompts
Ideogram offers a free tier that includes 10 prompts per day. Midjourney eliminated its free trial in 2023
GPT Image 2 features native Thinking Mode, 95%+ text rendering accuracy, web search during generation, up to 16 reference images, and native 4K output
Over 95% text accuracy for long headlines, dense paragraphs, small UI labels, and packaging copy, including non-Latin scripts
DALL-E 2 and DALL-E 3 are being retired on May 12, 2026. GPT Image 1.5 is deprecated as the default
Brand Kit guardrails: Colors, fonts, and logos that stay one click away. Resize and export formats: Social sizes, print-ready PDFs, transparent PNGs
Magic Switch helps by translating while keeping the layout style. Support for 150-plus languages
Headlines land on the correct baseline, kerning is believable, small caps render as small caps, specified date-and-venue lines come through readable rather than as decorative noise
Midjourney V6.1 produces the most photorealistic AI images available. Skin textures, lighting, and composition are a step above everything else
Ideogram 3.0 renders text inside images with near-perfect accuracy
Magic Studio lives inside a full design workflow, with templates, brand controls, asset libraries, team collaboration, and exports
Posters are GPT Image 2 best case. The model is materially better at both typography and composition than its predecessors and than Midjourney
